Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[], ref IPoint[])

Defines the best 3D affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[] fromPoints, ref IPoint[] toPoints)

Parameters

fromPoints IPoint[]
toPoints IPoint[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPoints(int, ref IPoint, ref IPoint)

Defines the best 3D affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

virtual void DefineFromControlPoints(int numPoints, ref IPoint fromPoints, ref IPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints IPoint
toPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPointsEx(int, ref WKSPointZ, ref WKSPointZ) 

virtual void DefineFromControlPointsEx(int numPoints, ref WKSPointZ fromPoints, ref WKSPointZ toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints WKSPointZ
toPoints WKSPointZ

GetControlPointError(int, out double, out double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

virtual void GetControlPointError(int i, out double fromError, out double toError)

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetRMSError(out double, out double)

RMS (Root Mean Square) error expressed relative to the 'from' and 'to' points defining the transformation. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

virtual void GetRMSError(out double fromError, out double toError)

Parameters

fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

IAffineTransformation3DGEN_GetControlPointError(int, ref double, ref double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

fromError double
toError double

IAffineTransformation3DGEN_TransformMeasuresFF(esriTransformDirection, ref double[], ref double[])

Transforms floating point measures to floating point measures (or do the inverse).

inMeasures double[]
outMeasures double[]
